# Signatories

## Project team

I'm the leader of the project, the author and maintainer of the `redlist` package. I'm ecological data scientist, with experience in package development (e.g [nimo](https://nimo.naben.org/), and [ct](https://stangandaho.github.io/ct/index.html)).

## Contributors

[Dr. Sylvestre Djagoun](https://scholar.google.com/citations?hl=en&user=VE0PwzAAAAAJ&view_op=list_works&sortby=pubdate)

## Consulted

The proposal has been discussed informally with colleagues in the conservation biology community.
